name: agent-labbook
description: Codex-first Notion public integration helper with a stateless Cloudflare Worker handoff for direct official API usage in Codex and other MCP-capable clients.

interface.shortDescription: Authorize a hosted Notion public integration, bind project resources locally, and then use the official Notion API directly.
interface.longDescription: This plugin does not wrap Notion reads and writes. It uses a stateless Cloudflare Worker at labbook.superplanner.net to complete Notion public-integration OAuth and token refresh, while storing access tokens and project bindings only in the local project. After auth it returns direct API context so Codex and other MCP-capable clients can use the original Notion REST API directly.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this project already has a saved Notion public-integration session and bound Notion resources.
Use the browser auth flow when this project is not authorized yet, or start a headless auth flow if opening a browser locally is not possible.
Bind one or more existing Notion pages or data sources to this project.
Return the Notion access token, headers, and bound resource IDs so the official Notion REST API can be used directly.
